questionHtml: Draw the structure of the monomers of Kevlar® if the by-product of the condensation polymerization is hydrogen chloride.
markschemeHtml:
OR
H2NC6H4NH2 ✔

OR

meta.title: Draw the structure of the monomers of Kevlar® if the by-product of the condensation polymerization is hydrogen chloride.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.4.6—Condensation polymers form by the reaction between functional groups in each monomer with the release of a small molecule. Represent the repeating unit of polyamides and polyesters from given monomer structures.
